overall.description: A third-person game scene showing a character with long blonde hair walking along a rocky shoreline in an overcast coastal environment. The character passes large rock formations and wooden banner poles before approaching a settlement with wooden docks and stone ruins.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline path between water and cliff wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the rocky shoreline beside calm water with a large cliff wall to the right

entered.detail: calm body of water along the left side of the path
tall dark rock formation forming a wall along the right side of the path
hazy mountain peaks visible in the background across the water

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow rocky shoreline path with calm water on the left and a massive rock cliff wall on the right. The overcast sky creates diffused lighting over the desaturated coastal landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: open coastal plain with ceremonial banner poles

events.description: large rock cliff recedes revealing open shoreline with tall wooden banner poles ahead

agents.ego_description: continuing along the shore approaching and passing between tall wooden poles with hanging banners

entered.detail: tall wooden poles with colorful prayer flags and banners strung between them
vertical banners hanging from the wooden poles fluttering in the wind

segments.scene_description: Exiting the narrow cliff passage, the scene opens into a wide coastal plain. The character approaches and walks between tall wooden poles adorned with prayer flags, with the shoreline curving away to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky coastal approach to wooden settlement

events.description: wooden settlement structures with docks become visible in the distance across the rocky terrain

agents.ego_description: walking across open rocky terrain toward distant wooden settlement structures visible ahead

entered.detail: cluster of wooden buildings and dock structures built along the shoreline
ancient stone wall fragments and foundations scattered on the right side of the path

segments.scene_description: The character traverses an open rocky coastal area with the banner poles now behind. A wooden settlement with dock structures becomes visible in the distance, while ancient stone ruins begin to appear on the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal settlement with stone ruins and wooden docks

events.description: character turns to survey the settlement area while navigating around stone ruins

agents.ego_description: navigating through stone ruins near the water's edge, examining the wooden dock settlement on the right

entered.detail: weathered wooden piers and dock platforms extending into the water

segments.scene_description: Approaching the settlement, the character explores the area containing ancient stone ruins and weathered wooden dock structures. The camera turns to survey the surroundings as the character navigates the rocky terrain near the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desolate coastline that transitions from a claustrophobic cliffside passage into an expansive open plain. It begins with the character walking a narrow rocky path, flanked by calm water on one side and a massive, towering rock wall on the other under a diffused, overcast sky. As the character moves forward, the oppressive cliff wall recedes and the landscape opens up into a wide coastal expanse. The scene then shifts as the character passes between tall wooden poles adorned with prayer flags, while the shoreline curves away into the distance.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement across a rocky shoreline that transitions from an open coastal expanse into a weathered settlement of stone and wood. It begins with the character traversing an open rocky area, leaving the banner poles behind as a distant wooden settlement and ancient stone ruins first emerge on the horizon. As the character advances, the path narrows toward the right, bringing the weathered stone ruins and dock structures into clear view. The scene then shifts as the camera turns to survey the immediate surroundings, following the character as they navigate the rugged terrain along the water's edge.
